scripts.lint: npm run scan:globalization && npm run scan:secrets && node --check server/config.mjs && node --check server/lyra-api.mjs && node --check server/production.mjs
scripts.test: node --test tests/assistant.test.mjs tests/bluesminds-provider.test.mjs tests/calculator.test.mjs tests/chat-completions.test.mjs tests/globalization.test.mjs tests/journey.test.mjs tests/lead.test.mjs tests/paint.test.mjs tests/scene-state.test.mjs tests/tools.test.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm test && npm run build && npm run test:e2e && npm run package:competition && npm run test:release
